base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of weapons_atlas — a pickup_item from 1991 final fantasy iv. All weapons — swords/axes/hammers/bows/rods/whips/claws/harps/staves per class. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
